zh.lifeSummary: 當Henricus Harding於1411年出生在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德紐可亞斯特爾 武朋時，他的父親Roger Harding21歲，母親Elizabeth Redheugh16歲。他於1423年與Alice Horton在英國坎布利其爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1450年在英國坎布利其爾坎布利其享年39歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾史達科特 奧 阿沃。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henricus Harding于1411年出生在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德紐可亞斯特爾 武朋时，他的父亲Roger Harding21岁，母亲Elizabeth Redheugh16岁。他于1423年与Alice Horton在英国坎布利其爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1450年在英国坎布利其爾坎布利其享年39岁，埋葬在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾史達科特 奧 阿沃。

nameMeanings.name: Harding
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Harding (Old English Hearding, literally ‘the hard one’ a derivative of Old English heard ‘hard, harsh, strong, firm, brave’). The surname was first taken to Ireland in the 15th century, and more families of the name settled there 200 years later in Tipperary and surrounding counties.

North German and Dutch: patronymic from a short form of any of various ancient Germanic compound personal names beginning with hard ‘hardy, brave, strong’, or a habitational name from a farm named Harding, of the same etymology.

History: Warren Gamaliel Harding (1865–1923), the 29th president of the US, was born on a farm in OH, of English and Scottish stock on his father's side. Early American bearers of this very common name include Joseph Harding who died at Plymouth in 1633. His great-great grandson Seth was a naval officer during the American Revolution.

variants.name: Hardin
meanings: French: from a pet form of any of several ancient Germanic personal names composed of the element hard ‘hard, strong’. This surname is rare in France.

variants.name: Arduino
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Francisco, Jose, Luis, Marina, Alberto, Alfonso, Alturo, Angel, Arturo, Azucena, Basilio, Carlos.  Italian Antonio, Gabino.
Italian and Hispanic: from the personal name Arduino, which is of ancient Germanic origin, akin to Harding 2.

nameMeanings.name: Henricus
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Hendricks
meanings: Dutch and North German: patronymic from the personal name   Hendrick  . See also   Hendriks  .

en.lifeSummary: When Henricus Harding was born in 1411, in Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, his father, Roger Harding, was 21 and his mother, Elizabeth Redheugh, was 16. He married Alice Horton in 1423, in Cambridgeshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died in 1450, in Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, England, at the age of 39, and was buried in Stratford on Avon, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henricus Harding est né en 1411, à Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Roger Harding, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Redheugh, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Alice Horton en 1423, à Cambridgeshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé en 1450, à Canteburge, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 39 ans, et a été enterré à Stratford on Avon, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Henricus Hardingが1411年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドニューカストル ウプオン トインで生まれた時，父Roger Hardingは21歳，母Elizabeth Redheughは16歳であった。1423年にイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアでAlice Hortonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1450年にイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアカンブリッジで39歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアストラトフォード オン アボンにて埋葬された。

ko.Newcastle, Northumberland, England: 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 뉴카스틀 업 타이니
ko.lifeSummary: Henricus Harding(이)가 1411년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 뉴카스틀 업 타이니에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger Harding(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Redheugh(은)는 16세였다. 그는 1423년 영국 캄브리지실르에서 Alice Horton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1450년 영국 캄브리지실르 캄브리지에서 39세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 스트라트퍼드  아폰에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henricus Harding родился в 1411 г. в местности нюкастл упон тин, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Roger Harding было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Redheugh, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Horton в 1423 г. в местности камбриджешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер в 1450 г. в местности камбридж, камбриджешир, Англия в возрасте 39 лет и был похоронен в местности стратфорд он авон, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Alice Horton en 1423, en Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en 1450, en Cantebriche, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 39 años, y fue sepultado en Stratford on Avon, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
